# Repository labels

GitHub labels used by the MIP process and PullPact. Create these on the repo if missing (`gh label create` or Settings → Labels).

## PullPact (automation)

| Label | Color | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
| `WIP` | `FBCA04` | Draft proposal PR; PullPact paused |
| `DONTMERGE` | `B60205` | Hard hold; PullPact paused |

## MIP status

| Label | Color | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
| `status:draft` | `C5DEF5` | Early idea (issues) |
| `status:candidate` | `0E8A16` | Decision window open (PRs) |
| `status:accepted` | `0E8A16` | Accepted outcome recorded |
| `status:rejected` | `D73A4A` | Rejected outcome recorded |
| `status:withdrawn` | `FEF2C0` | Withdrawn by author |
| `status:superseded` | `FEF2C0` | Replaced by a newer MIP |
| `emergency` | `B60205` | 72-hour urgent path |

## Triage

| Label | Color | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
| `needs-maintainer` | `FBCA04` | Awaiting maintainer action |
